headline: Assurant Outlook Rises As Global Lifestyle Earnings And Buybacks Draw Focus
summary: Assurant (NYSE:AIZ) reported strong Q1 2026 results, highlighted by record earnings from its Global Lifestyle segment. The company raised its full year 2026 outlook following the quarter and expanded its share repurchase program. Management actions point to confidence in the resilience of Assurant’s business mix and earnings profile. Assurant focuses on specialty insurance and protection products across mobile devices, extended service contracts, vehicle protection and housing related...
